description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces [3 times->4 times] starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to [(added) 100%] the farther the enemy is.
Deals Magic Damage [2 time(s)] to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for [3 sec->1.8 sec]. Damage increases by up to [(added) 200%] the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [(added) 1.8 sec], and reduces their Critical Chance by 100% for 7 sec. Damage increases by up to [(added) 150%] the farther the enemy is.

Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [2 sec->1.2 sec], and increasing Magic Damage taken by [(added) 20%] for [(added) 6 sec]. Damage increases by up to [(added) 200%] the farther the enemy is. [(removed) cleansing effect when CCed.]

dark.unified: Stuns enemies hit for [2 sec->1.2 seconds].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2->2000], but the number of hits is increased by [(added) 2].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but targets the farthest enemy. [(removed) ignores enemy block.]

light.unified: For 7 seconds, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by [150->200].

dark.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by [(added) 100%]. [(removed) 1 additional Mana Cost and long distance knockback.]

description.unified: [Pew!] Increases DMG by [20%->{0}%], and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by [?->200].
[Twinkle Twinkle] The Crit Chance Reduction effect becomes irremovable, and increases the duration by {0} sec.
[Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec. [(removed) increases knockback range.]
Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.
